data.title: SWAN PLUMBING, HEATING & AIR ENCOURAGES COLORADO HOMEOWNERS TO PLAN AHEAD AS LOW NOx REGULATION CHANGE AND SUMMER HEAT APPROACHES
data.description: On March 31, 2026, in Denver, new low-NOx regulations in Colorado are altering the HVAC systems technicians can install. Due to these changes, prices are predicted to increase. Swan Plumbing, Heating & Air, in response, is advising homeowners in Denver and Northern Colorado to prepare for potential cost hikes.

data.title: My Pediatric Doctor Launches National 24/7 Urgent Pediatric Care Telehealth Platform and Sets A Strategic Vision for Health System and Payer Integration
data.description: Pediatric telehealth care services are now accessible 24/7 across all 50 states, Guam, and Puerto Rico. My Pediatric Doctor, a crucial digital healthcare platform, is leading this initiative. This service caters to a wide array of healthcare innovation consortia, hospital systems, and insurance providers. The development was announced on March 31, 2026, demonstrating a significant advancement in pediatric care accessibility.

data.title: IKS Health Announces Acquihire of ThinkDTM, an AI-led Company
data.description: In Dallas, IKS Health, a prominent provider of care enablement solutions, has successfully completed an important acquisition by hiring ThinkDTM, an AI-centric company focused on product development and digital services. This strategic move includes welcoming ThinkDTM Founder Tij Bedi to the team. Bedi will now serve as the Executive Vice President and General Manager of Patient Access and Innovation at IKS Health. He will bring along his skilled team of AI specialists to join forces with IKS Health. This development comes at a crucial time as the healthcare sector faces ongoing disruptions, highlighting the significance of this acquisition.

data.title: Guiyang hosts 20th Guizhou Tourism Industry Development Conference
data.description: In Guiyang, China, on March 30, 2026, the 20th Guizhou Tourism Industry Development Conference took place, as reported by China Daily. Held at Drum Tower Square in Colorful Guizhou city, the opening ceremony showcased the province's advancements in smart tourism.

data.title: TA Connections Expands Disrupted Passenger Support for Aircalin Across Its Global Network
data.description: Atlanta-based company TA Connections has revealed the expansion of its services catering to disrupted passengers for Aircalin, the global airline of New Caledonia.

data.title: Applied AI Lab depthfirst Announces $80 Million in Series B Funding
data.description: depthfirst, an applied AI lab based in San Francisco, revealed the completion of its $80 million Series B funding round. The investment was spearheaded by Meritech Capital and included contributions from Forerunner Ventures and The House Fund, as well as existing investors like Accel, Box Group, Liquid 2 Ventures, Alt Capital, and Mantis VC. This latest funding push, unveiled less than 3 months after the company's emergence from stealth mode with $40 million in Series A funding, has now brought depthfirst's total capital raised to $120 million.

data.title: Restore Robotics Receives FDA 510(k) Clearance for Two Additional da Vinci Xi® Robotic Instruments
data.description: In Henderson, Nevada on March 31, 2026, Restore Robotics shared news of obtaining further 510(k) clearances from the U.S. FDA for refurbishing two additional da Vinci Xi robotic surgical tools. The company's achievement signifies an expansion in their capabilities, marking progress in the field of robotic surgical instrument remanufacturing.

data.title: Cross River Receives $50M to Fuel Expansion Across AI, Crypto, and Embedded Finance
data.description: CRB Group, Inc., based in Fort Lee, N.J., revealed a successful common equity capital raise of $50 million for its subsidiary, Cross River Bank. This boost in funding was secured from current investors of Cross River and accounts advised by T. Rowe Price Investment Management, Inc. The investment aims to support the vision for innovative financial services.

data.title: Sunbit’s Profitable Growth Earns Another Major Win: Inc.’s 2026 List of the Fastest-Growing Private Companies in the Pacific
data.description: A company based in Los Angeles, Sunbit, has achieved significant success as it has been listed on Inc.'s 2026 roundup of the fastest-growing private companies in the Pacific region. This recognition highlights Sunbit's profitable growth trajectory and its ability to outpace competitors in the market. The firm's impressive performance underscores its strong position in the industry.

data.title: Zinc Oxide Market worth $8.17 billion by 2031 - Exclusive Report by MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: On March 31, 2026, in Delray Beach, Florida, it was reported that the Zinc Oxide Market is experiencing growth, as revealed by MarketsandMarkets. The market is segmented based on process (Indirect, Direct, Wet-Chemical), grade (Standard, treated, USP, FCC), application (Rubber, Ceramics, Chemicals, Cosmetics & Personal Care, Pharmaceuticals), and region. This data suggests a promising outlook for the industry, with significant numbers indicating potential opportunities for various sectors.

data.title: Resolutions of the Ordinary General Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: Decisions were reached during the Ordinary General Meeting of Shareholders on March 31, 2026. The meeting addressed several agenda items, resulting in significant actions taken. Key resolutions were made during the meeting in relation to company affairs. Shareholders gathered to discuss pressing issues and make crucial decisions. The meeting saw a turnout of a significant number of shareholders, with a high level of participation from key stakeholders. The outcomes of the meeting are set to have a substantial impact on the company's future direction and operations.
